Hardware Component File

RBMS_SCPU_V3.1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference RBMS_SCPU_V3.1_20180910T142534.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 18DADCF1
Receive ID 18DAF1DC
Functional Addr DC
Functional Name LBC2_29b

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 3 Entries

Associated Devices

Cell input lines (SCPU) ID:
Insulation Resistance meacurement circuit ID:
SCPU/PCB temperature sensor ID:
Current sensor input (SCPU) ID:

External NV memory (EEPROM, FLASH) SCPU ID:
CAN current sensor (SCPU) ID:
Safety CPU/Slave Communication ID:
2nd ASSP (redundancy) ID:
Pack module temperature sensor (SCPU) ID:
Hot Spot (SPARE) sensor ID:
